original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求深色背景的女性高级礼盒面板或者放点黑白的玫瑰，主文案：晶耀乾坤 灵佑安康  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, High-End Luxury Commercial Photography style. [Subject Lock]: A classic beaded bracelet consisting of uniform, spherical beads made of high-clarity clear quartz, resting centrally on a luxurious dark velvet jewelry gift box podium. The beads exhibit a high degree of transparency and optical clarity, creating significant refraction, with a distinct linear channel visible through the center of each bead. 
[Props]: Surrounded by artistic monochrome roses (black and white flowers) and delicate dark silk textures, creating a premium feminine gift atmosphere.
[Background]: Deep dark studio background (Charcoal or Midnight Black) to maximize contrast with the transparent crystal.
Lighting is [Jewelry Studio Lighting], using a focused spotlight to create strong specular highlights on the upper surfaces of the beads and rim lighting to define the spherical shape."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (上文下图经典布局).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be Gold/White for High Contrast on Dark Background):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “晶耀乾坤 灵佑安康”. Position: [Top Center/Left]. Style: [3D Luxury Gold Serif Font, glowing effect]. Color: [Metallic Gold].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “平安顺遂 白水晶”. Style: [Clean White Sans-serif, elegant spacing].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “高端礼盒”. Style: [Minimalist Thin Line Border].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “天然甄选”. Style: [Small Gold Stamp icon]."
layout_logic: Since the product is transparent (Clear Quartz) and the background is dark/black, the lighting is crucial. The product needs to be 'lit from within' or have strong rim lighting to separate it from the dark background. For the text, use **Metallic Gold** or **Bright White** colors. Do not use dark text. Place the bracelet in the lower 60% of the frame to leave clean negative space at the top for the 'Main Title'.
